params.name: Vampire in the Forest
params.description:
On Mar 17, 1924 AD, after painting several drafts, the expressionist painter Edvard Munch began to officially paint Vampire in the Forest!
Edvard Munch is renowned for his representations of love, loneliness, and death. In this painting, he simplifies the details of the vampire, exaggerates and amplifies their emotions, making the depicted objects a carrier of emotions - two vampires hug each other with the anxiety and helplessness of life intertwined, conveying an impressive power!
